# Dinkum Tracker

> A free, browser-based progress tracker for the game Dinkum.
> All data is stored locally in your browser — no account or login required.

## What it tracks

- **Collections**: Fish, bugs, and critters (with donation status for the museum)
- **Milestones**: In-game achievement milestones
- **Licenses**: Town licenses and their unlock status
- **Skills**: Skill levels for each profession
- **Buildings**: Building construction progress
- **NPCs**: Relationship levels with townsfolk
- **Recipes**: Cooking, crafting, and sign-writing recipes
- **Equipment & Gear**: Tools, weapons, vehicles, clothing, and furniture
- **Calendar**: Current in-game day and season
- **Playthroughs**: Manage multiple save files independently

## Reference pages

- `/dinkum` — Game reference hub
- `/dinkum/animals` — Animal spawn locations and details
- `/dinkum/crops` — Crop growing seasons and yields
- `/dinkum/flowers` — Flower types and locations
- `/dinkum/resources` — Resource nodes and gathering info
- `/dinkum/seeds` — Seed types and planting info
- `/dinkum/trees` — Tree types and locations
- `/itemsBreakdown` — Cross-category item analysis
- `/weight-calculator` — Inventory weight calculator

## Technical notes

- Built with Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS
- No backend — all playthrough data lives in browser localStorage
- Open source, no ads, no tracking beyond Vercel Analytics
